Race-Halfling-Enslaved — Male Enslaved Halfling Fighter
Strength: 17 (+3) Dexterity: 15 (+2) Constitution: 11 (+0) Intelligence: 11 (+0) Wisdom: 16 (+3) Charisma: 12 (+1)
Background: Deserter Heroic Path: None Alignment: Lawful Good
Experience: 165/300 Level: 1 Size: Small Speed: 25 Carry/Lift: 255/510
Ability Notes:
Enslaved Halfling Ability Adjustment: +1 Constitution
Halfling Ability Adjustment: +2 Dexterity
Halfling Nimbleness: Can move through a space occupied by a larger creature
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +2
Feat Count: General: 0 Selectable Feature Count: Fighter (Fighting Style)
Enslaved Halfling Features: Enslaved Halfling Ability Adjustment; Halfling Ability Adjustment; Halfling Magic; Halfling Nimbleness; Halfling Skills; Lucky (Halfling); Unexpected Blow Fighter Features: Armor Proficiency (Light; Medium; Heavy; Shield); Fighting Style (Protection); Fighting Style; Save Proficiency (Strength; Constitution); Second Wind; Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Perception, Survival); Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Martial Weapons) Deserter Features: Old Veteran; Skill Proficiency (Athletics; Perception); Weapon Proficiency (Choose 1 from any Martial)
Feature Notes:
Fighting Style: 1 selection
Lucky (Halfling): Can reroll 1s on attacks, ability checks, and saves
Old Veteran: Knows how to infiltrate military organizations
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +2 Insight: (wis) +3 Performance: (cha) +1
Animal Handling: (wis) +3 Intimidation: (cha) +1 Persuasion: (cha) +1
Arcana: (int) +0 Investigation: (int) +0 Religion: (int) +0
Athletics: (str) +5 Medicine: (wis) +3 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +2
Deception: (cha) +1 Nature: (int) +0 Stealth: (dex) +2
History: (int) +2 Perception: (wis) +5 Survival: (wis) +5
Skill Proficiency: Athletics; History; Perception; Survival
Languages: Erenlander; Halfling; Trader's Tongue
Skill Notes: Halfling Skills: Language (Halfling; Erenlander; Choose 1 from Trader's Tongue, Orcish)
Combat
Hit Points: 6 Initiative: +2 Armor Class: 12
Armor Proficiency: Heavy; Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Halberd; Martial Weapons; Simple Weapons
Armor: None Shield: None Weapons: Atharak (+5 1d4+3 S); Greatsword (+5 2d6+3 S); Quarterstaff (+5 1d6+3 B [2h d8]); Unarmed Strike (+5 1+3 B)
Combat Notes:
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +2
Strength Attack Adjustment: +3
Strength Damage Adjustment: +3
Fighting Style (Protection): Can use a reaction and a shield to inflict disadvantage on an attack targeting an adjacent creature
Second Wind: Can use a bonus action to regain 1d10+1 hit points once per short rest
Small: Has disadvantage on attacks with heavy weapons
Unexpected Blow: Can reroll 1 damage die when attacking an unaware foe
Save Proficiency: Constitution; Strength
Save: Charisma: +1; Constitution: +2; Dexterity: +2; Intelligence: +0; Strength: +5; Wisdom: +3
Magic
Attack: Halfling: 3 Spell DC: Halfling: 11
Spells:
Mending (Halfling0 [Halfling Magic] Tran): Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Prestidigitation (Halfling0 [Halfling Magic] Tran): R10' Creates a minor magic effect: a brief, harmless sensory effect; lighting or snuffing a flame; cleaning or soiling a 1' cube; chilling, warming, or flavoring a 1' cube for 1 hr; marking an object for 1 hr; creating a nonmagical trinket or illusion until the end of the next turn
Magic Notes: Halfling Magic: Knows the Mending and Prestidigitation cantrips
